violations.text: The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by small amount of droppings on the outer boxes of canned food and small accumulation on floors in back food storage area . The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies.PIC to remove outer boxes and sanitize cans before opening. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024
Bread was observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023
Serving line is lacking an adequate sneeze guard. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023
Prep table located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023
Refrigerator door and milk cooler gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023
Inspector observed missing ceiling tile in the dish room. Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023
